overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a white coat walking through a modern lounge interior with seated NPCs, then exiting into a vibrant cyberpunk street filled with pink neon signs and digital billboards. The character walks toward a large 'ENHANCE!' advertisement and enters a doorway.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a modern, warmly lit lounge interior featuring white sofas and contemporary furniture. Two NPCs sit conversing on a central sofa as the character moves toward a large window and exit doorway at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk commercial street with towering neon billboards

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the lounge into a narrow cyberpunk street bathed in vibrant pink and purple neon light. The environment features towering digital billboards including a large hexagonal 'ENHANCE!' advertisement and 'The Emporium' sign. The character walks along metal grate flooring past other pedestrians and industrial piping, eventually approaching and entering a doorway with green interior lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene, modern interior into the vibrant chaos of a neon-drenched cyberpunk street. It begins by trailing a character in a white coat through a warmly lit lounge, passing contemporary white sofas and conversing NPCs as the camera moves toward a distant exit. As the character steps through the doorway, the soft interior lighting abruptly shifts to a saturated palette of pink and purple neon. The scene then expands into a narrow alleyway of metal grates and industrial piping, where the camera glides past pedestrians and towering digital billboards, including a prominent hexagonal ENHANCE! advertisement. Finally, the movement concludes as the character approaches and enters a doorway glowing with contrasting green interior light.
